info.title: SignalArc Custom GPT Action API
info.description: OpenAPI schema for the SignalArc Custom GPT action surface. Covers Circle Agent Wallet onboarding, sessions, wallet/balance visibility, market intent lifecycle, and read-only market discovery on Arc Testnet. Custom GPT MUST always call a matching Action when the user asks to onboard, verify, register, check session/wallet/balance, request faucet, list markets, or create/confirm/execute an intent. The GPT MUST generate a unique agent_id for each new user and MUST NOT use generic placeholder agent_id values such as signalarc-gpt-agent, agent_desi_001, default, test, demo, user, or chatgpt. The recommended agent_id shape is agent_<slug>_chatgpt_<suffix>, for example agent_sanatarau21_chatgpt_001. For create_market intents, close_timestamp MUST be sent as a UTC RFC3339 string such as 2026-05-31T23:59:00Z or as a unix-seconds integer string such as 1780000000; natural-language dates such as 'end of May 2026' MUST be converted before the Action is called.

get.summary: List up to 50 SignalArc markets for read-only discovery
get.description: Read-only market discovery. Returns up to 50 SignalArc markets on Arc Testnet with status (DRAFT, OPEN, CLOSED, RESOLVED, SETTLED), category, collateral_asset, chain, and closes_at. Call this Action when the user asks for open markets, trending markets, or any market list.

get.summary: Get a SignalArc market by id
get.description: Returns a single SignalArc market record by id. Read-only.

Compact, agent-friendly market list for SignalArc Arc Testnet markets. Same dataset as listMarkets but with a flat shape suited to natural-language summaries. Read-only. The Custom GPT SHOULD call this Action when the user asks to see open markets, trending markets, or any market list.

post.summary: Start SignalArc Circle Agent Wallet onboarding and dispatch OTP email
post.description: Starts a SignalArc Circle Agent Wallet onboarding session. The Custom GPT MUST generate a unique agent_id per user (recommended agent_<slug>_chatgpt_<suffix>, e.g. agent_sanatarau21_chatgpt_001) and MUST NOT use generic placeholders such as signalarc-gpt-agent, agent_desi_001, default, or test.

agent_id.description: Unique SignalArc agent identifier for this user/session. MUST start with agent_ and use only letters, digits, underscores, or hyphens. MUST NOT be a generic placeholder such as signalarc-gpt-agent, agent_desi_001, default, defaultagent, test, testagent, demo, demoagent, user, useragent, agent, chatgpt, or chatgpt_agent. Recommended shape agent_<slug>_chatgpt_<suffix>.

user_email.description: Email address that will receive the Circle OTP.

user_wallet.description: Optional EVM address of the user's connected wallet. Optional at onboarding-start; not required for the Circle OTP path.

source_client.description: Identifier for the calling client surface, for example chatgpt_custom_action.

channel.description: Channel routing label, for example chatgpt.

chatgptOnboardingStart.summary: Custom GPT onboarding start with a unique agent_id

200.description: OTP email dispatched, onboarding pending verification

201.description: OTP email dispatched, onboarding pending verification

400.description: Invalid onboarding start request, including generic agent_id rejection

409.description: Onboarding already exists for this agent

501.description: Circle Agent Wallet OTP start is not configured

502.description: Circle Agent Wallet OTP start failed

post.summary: Verify OTP, register agent wallet, and activate agent session
post.description: Verifies the OTP code emailed to the user during the onboarding/start step. Reuse the onboarding_id returned by startAgentOnboarding exactly. Do not retry verifyAgentOnboarding without first running startAgentOnboarding for a fresh OTP if the OTP request has expired.

otp.description: The OTP code from the email Circle sent to the user.

200.description: OTP verified, agent wallet registered, agent session activated

501.description: Circle Agent Wallet resolution or activation is not configured

502.description: Circle Agent Wallet OTP verification or wallet resolution failed

get.description: Returns the active agent session for the provided agent_id. Always pass the exact agent_id returned by startAgentOnboarding. Never use a generic placeholder.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Reuse the exact agent_id returned by startAgentOnboarding. Example: agent_sanatarau21_chatgpt_001.

get.description: Returns the registered Circle Agent Wallet record for the provided agent_id. Always pass the exact agent_id returned by startAgentOnboarding.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Reuse the exact agent_id returned by startAgentOnboarding.

get.summary: Get read-only SignalArc Circle Agent Wallet balance
get.description: Returns a read-only Circle Agent Wallet balance snapshot. Always pass the exact agent_id returned by startAgentOnboarding.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Reuse the exact agent_id returned by startAgentOnboarding.

200.description: Read-only Circle Agent Wallet balance snapshot

501.description: Circle Agent Wallet balance lookup is not configured

502.description: Circle Agent Wallet balance lookup failed

post.summary: Request ARC-TESTNET faucet funding for an active SignalArc agent wallet
post.description: Requests ARC-TESTNET USDC faucet funding for the registered agent wallet. Always pass the exact agent_id returned by startAgentOnboarding.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Reuse the exact agent_id returned by startAgentOnboarding.

200.description: Faucet request was forwarded to the Circle CLI testnet faucet for the registered agent wallet address

409.description: Agent wallet is not active or is not on ARC-TESTNET

501.description: Circle Agent Wallet faucet helper is not configured in this runtime

502.description: Circle Agent Wallet faucet request failed

post.summary: Create a SignalArc agent intent preview
post.description: Creates a durable agent intent preview. Reuse the exact agent_id from startAgentOnboarding and send valid JSON. Duplicate agent_id + source_client + client_request_id requests return the existing intent. For action=create_market, close_timestamp MUST be a UTC RFC3339 string such as 2026-05-31T23:59:00Z or a unix-seconds integer string such as 1780000000. Convert natural-language dates first.

agent_id.description: Reuse the exact agent_id returned by startAgentOnboarding. Never use generic placeholders such as signalarc-gpt-agent or agent_desi_001.

source_client.description: Calling client identifier, for example chatgpt_custom_action.

client_request_id.description: Caller-generated idempotency token for this intent.

user_wallet.description: EVM address that owns the user-side context for this intent.

question.description: Required for create_market. Plain natural-language question for the new market.
question.example: Will BTC be above 50k in May 2026?

close_timestamp.description: Required for create_market. UTC RFC3339 string such as 2026-05-31T23:59:00Z or a unix-seconds integer string such as 1780000000. Natural-language dates are not accepted; convert before calling. Sending an integer is also accepted but the string form is preferred.

resolver.description: Required for create_market. EVM address of the resolver.

collateral_token.description: Required for create_market. EVM address of the collateral token (USDC on ARC-TESTNET).

market_contract_address.description: Required for buy_yes, buy_no, close_market, resolve_market, cancel_market, claim_refund, and claim_payout.

amount.description: Required for buy_yes and buy_no. Decimal string such as 1000000.

value.question: Will BTC be above 50k in May 2026?

400.description: Invalid intent request. Common codes: invalid_json (request body must be valid JSON; for create_market send close_timestamp as RFC3339 such as 2026-05-31T23:59:00Z or as a unix-seconds integer string).

403.description: Action not allowed for this agent

post.description: Confirms a previewed intent. Always reuse the exact intent_id returned by createAgentIntent.

agent_id.description: Reuse the exact agent_id returned by startAgentOnboarding.

409.description: Intent already confirmed or in invalid state

get.description: Returns a durable agent intent by intent_id. Configured backend runtimes store intent preview, confirmation, executed, and failed state in Postgres.

post.summary: Execute a confirmed SignalArc agent intent
post.description: Executes a confirmed intent through the registered Circle Agent Wallet on ARC-TESTNET. Always reuse the exact intent_id returned by createAgentIntent and the exact agent_id returned by startAgentOnboarding.

agent_id.description: Reuse the exact agent_id returned by startAgentOnboarding.

403.description: Action not allowed for this agent or wallet

close_timestamp.description: Normalized close timestamp. Backend stores the unix-seconds string for create_market. Example: 1780000000.
